# New Release | Date

### Description:

> Describe the new release and some key factors of what has changed and/or been updated.

#

### Type of release:

- [ ] **Bug Change** - Update to a problem that was with the website / code and works as needed.
- [ ] **Feature** - Added new content and files for the website. (*Ex*: png, html, mp3 or folders).
- [ ] **Breaking change** - fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected.
- [ ] **Big Update** - This release has a massive update and needs a separate file of documentation to describe all contents.

### Release confirmation:

| Type | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| Releasor | Name of person who released |
| Date confirmed | 00 / 00 / 0000 |
| Refer Confirm | Person who gave permission to release |
| Version | v0.0.0 (Type of version *ex:* BETA)
